title: Fix internvl fp16 error
body:
This PR addresses an FP16 interval-related error observed when using the llama.cpp bindings under ipex-llm. The issue manifested as incorrect behavior or instability in the FP16 KV/interval handling path when FP16 mode is enabled. The changes target the Python GGML llama bindings to ensure FP16 interval state is properly saved/loaded and sampled without misalignment.

Proposed changes focus on:
- Ensuring the llama state save/load paths correctly account for FP16 memory layout and sizes when f16_kv is enabled.
- Tightening memory operations around the FP16 path to avoid misalignment or truncated state data.
- Preserving existing behavior for non-FP16 paths while stabilizing FP16 paths.

This should reduce crashes or incorrect logits/probabilities when FP16 is active and interval-based sampling is used.

Testing guidance:
- Unit tests around save_state/load_state paths with f16_kv enabled/disabled.
- End-to-end generation tests on GPUs supporting FP16 (e.g., Intel Arc) to verify stability.
- Compare logits/logprobs against baseline non-FP16 runs for sanity checks.

No new dependencies introduced.

step_plan.summary: This PR stabilizes FP16 interval handling for the ipex-llm llama bindings by correcting state save/load and tightening FP16-related sampling/evaluation paths, ensuring proper memory layout and size when f16_kv is enabled while preserving non-FP16 behavior.

steps.operation: Enhance Llama.save_state to correctly copy and serialize FP16 KV state when f16_kv is enabled
steps.reason: To prevent FP16 interval data corruption by ensuring the serialized state has proper size and layout for FP16 memory when f16_kv is active; guard against partial copies and misalignment
steps.side_effects: Requires tests for save_state with f16_kv on/off; may affect cache/state serialization format; potential impacts on state patching compatibility and downstream loading paths

steps.operation: Enhance Llama.load_state to apply FP16-state blobs safely with proper size/compatibility checks
steps.reason: Avoid misalignment when restoring FP16 interval state; validate stateSize and ensure deserialization respects FP16 memory layout to prevent corrupted intervals
steps.side_effects: May require updates to loading tests; ensure backward compatibility for non-FP16 loads and existing cache handling

steps.operation: Tighten sampling path for FP16 interval with f16_kv by guarding last_n_tokens_size and ensuring logits are adjusted under FP16
steps.reason: Prevent FP16 interval artifacts during sampling due to memory layout or size tracking; ensure stable behavior when FP16 path is active while preserving non-FP16 behavior
steps.side_effects: Tests must cover FP16 on/off; possible minor changes in sampling timing or edge-case handling; ensure no regression in non-FP16 mode

steps.operation: Stabilize evaluation path under FP16 by robustly handling logits/state interplay and ensuring no interval misalignment in Llama.eval
steps.reason: Prevent FP16-related interval inconsistencies during evaluation batches; ensure FP16 path does not disrupt logits/state propagation and maintains parity with non-FP16 behavior
steps.side_effects: Requires end-to-end FP16 tests on compatible hardware; monitor for any minor performance impact; verify no regressions for non-FP16 evaluations
